metadata.name: ario_gar
metadata.description: AR.IO GAR Program - Gateway Address Registry with staking, delegation, epochs, observations, and rewards

docs: AR.IO GAR Program (Gateway Address Registry)
Consolidated program handling:
- Gateway join/leave network (F10-F11)
- Gateway settings management (F12)
- Operator stake management (F13-F14)
- Delegate stake management (F15-F17)
- Withdrawal management (F18-F19)
- Delegate allowlists (F20)
- Gateway pruning (F21)
- Epoch creation and ticking (F23-F24)
- Observation submission (F25-F26)
- Reward distribution (F27-F29)

instructions.name: admin_repair_settings
docs: Admin recovery — repair `GatewaySettings.mint` /
`.stake_token_account` / `.protocol_token_account` for clusters
where genesis was partially-initialized. See
`instructions::initialize::admin_repair_settings` for the
motivation comment + the matching `ario_core::admin_repair_config`
for the cross-program companion. Pre-cutover only.

instructions.name: allow_delegate
docs: Add a delegate to the gateway's allowlist (F20)
Matches Lua: gar.allowDelegates

instructions.name: cancel_withdrawal
docs: Cancel a pending withdrawal, returning stake to the gateway (F18)
Matches Lua: gar.cancelGatewayWithdrawal — returns vault balance to operator_stake or delegate.amount

accounts.name: delegation
docs: Optional delegation account (required when cancelling delegate withdrawal).
Validated in the instruction handler when withdrawal.is_delegate == true.

instructions.name: claim_delegate_from_leaving_gateway
docs: H2: Claim delegate stake from a leaving gateway.
Matches Lua: gar.leaveNetwork -> kickDelegateFromGateway for each delegate.
In Solana, delegates must claim individually (can't iterate PDAs on-chain).
Creates a withdrawal vault for the delegate's full stake from the leaving gateway.

accounts.name: delegator
docs: (the seeds constraint above re-derives `[DELEGATION_SEED, gateway,
delegator]` and requires it match the passed account address). No
signature required — the caller cannot redirect anyone's stake by
substituting a different pubkey here.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays for the rent on the withdrawal counter (`init_if_needed`) and
the withdrawal vault (`init`). Typically the cranker. Permissionless:
any signer who's willing to cover ~0.003 SOL of rent can crank this.

instructions.name: claim_withdrawal
docs: Claim matured withdrawal

instructions.name: close_drained_withdrawal
docs: Close a fully-drained Withdrawal vault and refund rent to the owner.
Permissionless cleanup; pairs with `deduct_withdrawal_for_payment`
(which never closes the vault, even at zero).

accounts.name: owner
docs: constraint. The `close = owner` constraint above redirects lamports
here, so a third-party `closer` cannot redirect rent to themselves.

accounts.name: closer
docs: Permissionless caller — anyone willing to pay the tx fee can clean up
a drained vault. Rent always goes to `owner` regardless of who signs.

instructions.name: close_empty_delegation
docs: Close a delegation account with zero balance (permissionless cleanup)
Matches Lua: delegation pruning when delegatedStake == 0

accounts.name: delegation
docs: GAR-016: Rent is returned to the original delegator, not the caller,
to prevent griefing where a cranker harvests rent from other users' accounts.

accounts.name: delegator
docs: The original delegator — receives rent refund on close.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can close an empty delegation (permissionless)

instructions.name: close_epoch
docs: Close a fully distributed epoch account, reclaiming rent.
Permissionless — anyone can call once the epoch is distributed and
at least `epoch_retention` epochs have passed.

instructions.name: close_observation
docs: Close an observation PDA from a fully distributed epoch, reclaiming rent.
Permissionless — anyone can call once the parent epoch is distributed.

instructions.name: compound_delegation_rewards
docs: Compound delegation rewards by settling the reward-per-share accumulator.
Delegates call this to materialize pending rewards into their delegation amount.

instructions.name: create_epoch
docs: Create a new epoch (F23)
This is permissionless - anyone can call when the previous epoch has ended

accounts.name: settings
docs: GAR settings PDA — used to validate protocol_token_account address

accounts.name: protocol_token_account
docs: Protocol token account to read balance for reward calculation

instructions.name: create_gateway_registry
docs: Create the GatewayRegistry zero-copy account (~120KB).
Separated from [`initialize`] so large PDAs are not created in the same tx as settings init.

instructions.name: decrease_delegate_stake
docs: Decrease delegated stake - creates withdrawal (F16)

instructions.name: decrease_operator_stake
docs: Decrease operator stake - creates withdrawal (F14)

instructions.name: deduct_delegation_for_payment
docs: Deduct from delegation and send to protocol treasury.
Designed for CPI from ario-arns to fund ArNS purchases from delegated stake.

accounts.name: delegator
docs: The delegator must sign (authorizes deduction from their own stake)

instructions.name: deduct_operator_stake_for_payment
docs: Deduct from operator stake and send to protocol treasury.
Designed for CPI from ario-arns to fund ArNS purchases from operator stake.

accounts.name: operator
docs: The operator must sign (authorizes deduction from their own stake)

instructions.name: deduct_withdrawal_for_payment
docs: Deduct from a Withdrawal vault and send to protocol treasury.
Used both directly (ArNS `_from_withdrawal` variants) and as a primitive
inside `pay_from_funding_plan` for the multi-source path. Vault stays
open even at zero — pair with `close_drained_withdrawal` for cleanup.
Gateway-status-independent.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The withdrawal owner must sign (authorizes payment from their vault)

instructions.name: delegate_stake
docs: Delegate stake to a gateway (F15)

instructions.name: disallow_delegate
docs: Remove a delegate from the gateway's allowlist (F20)
If delegate still has stake, they keep it but cannot add more after removal.
Matches Lua: gar.disallowDelegates

instructions.name: distribute_epoch
docs: Distribute rewards for an epoch in batches.
Processes gateway accounts from remaining_accounts. Call repeatedly until all gateways are processed.

accounts.name: settings
docs: GAR settings PDA — used as signer for protocol token transfers

accounts.name: protocol_token_account
docs: Protocol token account (source of reward tokens, authority = settings PDA)

accounts.name: stake_token_account
docs: Stake token account (destination for staked rewards)

instructions.name: finalize_gone
docs: Permissionless GC for a gateway in `Leaving` status whose leave window
has expired and whose delegations have all been claimed. Sets the
gateway to `Gone`, swap-removes its registry slot, and closes the
Gateway PDA — caller receives the rent.

accounts.name: epoch_settings
docs: Read-only — used to compute the GC eligibility window
against `max(gateway.leave_epoch_duration, epoch_settings.epoch_duration)`.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless: anyone willing to pay the tx fee can crank GC and
receives the Gateway PDA's rent as the cleanup incentive.

instructions.name: finalize_migration
docs: Permanently disable migration imports (main authority only)

instructions.name: import_account
docs: Import a pre-serialized account during migration

instructions.name: import_registry_entry
docs: Import a gateway entry into the GatewayRegistry

instructions.name: increase_operator_stake
docs: Increase operator stake (F13)

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize GAR program (once per deployment)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Bind initialize to the program's upgrade authority — closes the
front-run window between `solana program deploy` and `initialize`
(audit H1 / Theme C). Explicit `Some(payer.key())` equality
rejects revoked upgrade authority (`None`).

instructions.name: initialize_epochs
docs: Initialize epoch settings

accounts.name: payer
docs: Bind initialize_epochs to the program's upgrade authority — closes
the front-run window between `solana program deploy` and
`initialize_epochs` (audit H1 / Theme C). Explicit
`Some(payer.key())` equality rejects revoked upgrade authority.

instructions.name: instant_withdrawal
docs: Expedited (instant) withdrawal with time-decaying penalty (F19)
Penalty decays linearly from max to min as time elapses in the withdrawal period.
Matches Lua processInstantWithdrawal: penaltyRate = max - (max - min) * elapsed / total
Applies to all withdrawals including exit vaults (leave_network/prune_gateway).

instructions.name: join_network
docs: Join the AR.IO network as a gateway operator (F10)
SECURITY: Re-join after leave_network is structurally prevented because the gateway PDA
uses `init` (not `init_if_needed`) and gateway accounts are never closed — they persist
with Leaving status. If gateway account closure is ever added, a re-join cooldown must
be implemented to prevent failed_consecutive counter resets.

accounts.name: observer_lookup
docs: SHOULD-9: Observer lookup PDA enforces observer address uniqueness.
init fails if another gateway already claims this observer address.

instructions.name: leave_network
docs: Leave the AR.IO network (F11)
Sets gateway to Leaving status with a 90-day leave period.
Operator stake becomes withdrawable after leave period.
Delegates are notified to withdraw (handled via separate delegate withdrawal txs).
Matches Lua: gateway.status = "leaving", leaveLengthMs = 90 days

accounts.name: epoch_settings
docs: Read-only — only consulted to snapshot `epoch_duration` onto the
gateway so `finalize_gone` can compute the GC eligibility window
from a value frozen at leave time (defense against admin retuning).

accounts.name: withdrawal
docs: Anchor-init slot: holds the **protected exit vault** (`is_protected:
true`) for `min(min_operator_stake, operator_stake)` — Lua's
`createGatewayExitVault`. Always created when there's any stake to
vault; an immediately-claimable zero-amount placeholder is kept for
the rent-reclaim path (matches the prune L-6 behavior, generalized
to leave for symmetry).

accounts.name: excess_withdrawal
docs: Optional **excess vault** slot (`is_protected: false`) — Lua's
`createGatewayWithdrawVault` for the `operator_stake - min_stake`
portion. The handler creates it manually (system_program::create_account
CPI) when `excess_amount > 0`; passes through unmodified when zero.
Caller derives PDA off-chain using `WITHDRAWAL_COUNTER.next_id + 1`
(i.e. the slot AFTER the exit vault).
via system_program CPI, and the data write all run only when the
excess amount is non-zero. Skipped slot stays unowned.

instructions.name: migrate_settings_set_arns_program_id
docs: One-shot backfill of `GatewaySettings::arns_program_id` for accounts
deployed before that field existed. Idempotent — safe to call on
already-migrated accounts (returns early). See migration.rs for details.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority signer — validated against settings.authority (offset 8, 32 bytes).
The handler reads the authority pubkey directly from the account bytes
so we can authenticate without deserializing via Anchor (the old layout
would fail that deserialization).

instructions.name: migrate_settings_supply_counters
docs: One-shot backfill of supply counter fields on GatewaySettings.
Called after migration import with the correct totals computed from
imported gateways, delegations, and withdrawals.

instructions.name: pay_from_funding_plan
docs: Apply a multi-source funding plan, transferring `expected_total` mARIO
into the protocol treasury. Lua-faithful port of `gar.applyFundingPlan`:
dispatches across Balance / Delegation / OperatorStake / Withdrawal
sources, aggregates per-source bookkeeping, and issues at most two SPL
transfers. Auto-creates a Withdrawal vault for sub-min Delegation
residue. Single-gateway invariant: all Delegation/OperatorStake sources
must reference the same gateway; Withdrawal/Balance are gateway-free.

accounts.name: payer_token_account
docs: Required when any Balance source is present (the payer's ATA).
Owner is verified at SPL-transfer time (Token Program enforces it).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Funder + signer — must match the source PDAs' owner field for every
Delegation / Withdrawal / OperatorStake source.

accounts.name: withdrawal_counter
docs: Always passed. `init_if_needed` so first-time vault creators don't
need a separate setup tx. Cost is ~0.0034 SOL once per user (paid
even for plans that don't end up creating a residue vault — the
alternative is doubling the ix surface, which we prefer to avoid).

instructions.name: prescribe_epoch
docs: Prescribe observers and names for an epoch (single tx, deterministic selection).
Uses weighted roulette from hashchain entropy. Computes per-unit rewards.

accounts.name: settings
docs: Read-only — provides `arns_program_id` for NameRegistry validation
(formerly a hardcoded literal in this file). No write access required.

instructions.name: prune_gateway
docs: Prune a gateway that has exceeded maximum consecutive failures (F21)
Permissionless — anyone can call if gateway has 30+ consecutive failures.
Matches Lua: slash min operator stake, return remainder in withdrawal, remove from registry.

accounts.name: withdrawal
docs: Anchor-init slot. Either the protected exit vault (`is_protected:
true`) for the post-slash min portion, OR an empty zero-amount
placeholder when the slash consumed everything (full-slash edge
case; placeholder is immediately claimable so rent can be reclaimed).

accounts.name: excess_withdrawal
docs: Optional excess vault slot (`is_protected: false`) — created
manually when post-slash stake exceeds `min_operator_stake`. PDA
derived from `WITHDRAWAL_COUNTER.next_id + 1`.
empty-data, lamport top-up, allocate + assign via system_program.

accounts.name: stake_token_account
docs: Stake token account holding gateway tokens (PDA-controlled)

accounts.name: protocol_token_account
docs: Protocol token account to receive slashed tokens

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call prune (permissionless crank)

instructions.name: redelegate_stake
docs: Redelegate stake from one gateway to another (F17)
Fee = min(10% * redelegation_count, 60%) — first is free, resets every 7 days
Fee goes to protocol. Net amount moves to target delegation.

accounts.name: delegator_token_account
docs: `owner == delegator` and `mint == settings.mint`. Kept as `UncheckedAccount` because adding
three fully-deserialized `Box<Account<'_, TokenAccount>>` to this context overflows the
SBF 4 KB stack frame inside Anchor's generated `try_accounts` (BPF stack-frame error).

accounts.name: stake_token_account
docs: `settings.stake_token_account` and `mint == settings.mint`. Same SBF stack-frame
rationale as `delegator_token_account`.

accounts.name: protocol_token_account
docs: `settings.protocol_token_account` and `mint == settings.mint`. Same SBF stack-frame
rationale as `delegator_token_account`.

instructions.name: release_treasury_authority
docs: Admin one-shot: transfer SPL `Owner` authority of `protocol_token_account`
from the GatewaySettings PDA to a target authority (typically
`ario-core`'s ArioConfig PDA, which signs SPL transfers in
`ario_core::import_balance`'s genesis-distribution branch).
Mainnet creates the treasury under ArioConfig from the start; this
instruction is the migration path for already-deployed clusters.
See `instructions::initialize::release_treasury_authority` for the
motivation comment.

accounts.name: protocol_token_account
docs: Treasury account whose SPL `Owner` authority is being transferred.
Must currently be owned by the GatewaySettings PDA (i.e. its
`owner` field equals `settings.key()`); the SetAuthority CPI
would fail otherwise but we surface the mismatch as a typed
error first.

instructions.name: save_observations
docs: Submit observation report (F25)

instructions.name: set_allowlist_enabled
docs: Enable or disable the allowlist for a gateway

instructions.name: set_epochs_enabled
docs: Enable/disable epoch processing

instructions.name: tally_weights
docs: Tally weights for gateways in batches (permissionless crank).
Computes weights for each gateway and caches composite_weight in registry slots.
Accumulates total_composite_weight in the epoch.
Call repeatedly with batches of gateway accounts until all are processed.

instructions.name: update_gateway_settings
docs: Update gateway settings (F12)

instructions.name: update_observer_address
docs: Update the observer address for a gateway (SHOULD-9)
Separate instruction because it needs Anchor-managed init/close for the lookup PDAs.

errors.name: GatewayNotJoined
errors.msg: Gateway is not in joined status

errors.name: InvalidRewardShare
errors.msg: Invalid reward share ratio - must be 0-95

errors.name: MustLeaveFirst
errors.msg: Must leave network before withdrawing all stake

errors.name: DelegationNotAllowed
errors.msg: Delegation not allowed for this gateway

errors.name: InvalidDelegateStatus
errors.msg: Delegate not eligible for reward distribution

errors.name: CannotDelegateToSelf
errors.msg: Cannot delegate to your own gateway - use increase_operator_stake instead

errors.name: WithdrawalNotReady
errors.msg: Withdrawal not ready - lock period not elapsed

errors.name: ExitVaultCannotBeExpedited
errors.msg: Exit vault withdrawals cannot be expedited

errors.name: NotPrescribedObserver
errors.msg: Not a prescribed observer for this epoch

errors.name: NoObserversAvailable
errors.msg: No more observers available to prescribe

errors.name: WeightsAlreadyTallied
errors.msg: Composite weights have already been tallied for this epoch

errors.name: WeightsNotTallied
errors.msg: Composite weights have not been tallied yet

errors.name: EpochNotCloseable
errors.msg: Epoch not yet closeable — must be distributed and past retention

errors.name: InvalidAccountData
errors.msg: Invalid account data for migration import

errors.name: InvalidPda
errors.msg: PDA derivation does not match target account

errors.name: ObserverAddressTaken
errors.msg: Observer address already in use by another gateway

errors.name: WithdrawalNotDrained
errors.msg: Withdrawal vault still holds funds — cannot close

errors.name: TooManyFundingSources
errors.msg: Funding plan exceeds the per-tx source cap

errors.name: FundingPlanAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Sum of source amounts does not match the expected total

errors.name: ZeroFundingSourceAmount
errors.msg: Funding plan source has zero amount

errors.name: MissingGatewayForFundingSource
errors.msg: Delegation/OperatorStake source requires the gateway account

errors.name: MissingPayerTokenAccountForFundingSource
errors.msg: Balance source requires the payer's token account

errors.name: MissingFundingSourceAccount
errors.msg: Funding plan declared more sources than were passed in remaining_accounts

errors.name: ExtraneousFundingSourceAccount
errors.msg: remaining_accounts contained more entries than the funding plan declared

errors.name: OnlyOneDelegationSource
errors.msg: Funding plan may include at most one Delegation source per gateway

errors.name: OnlyOneOperatorStakeSource
errors.msg: Funding plan may include at most one OperatorStake source

errors.name: TooManyDelegationSources
errors.msg: Funding plan exceeds the per-tx Delegation source cap

errors.name: DuplicateGatewayInSources
errors.msg: Two or more sources reference the same gateway — aggregate them client-side

errors.name: MismatchedResidueVaultCount
errors.msg: residue_vault_count does not match the number of sub-min Delegation residues

errors.name: GatewayNotLeaving
errors.msg: finalize_gone: gateway is not in Leaving status

errors.name: LeaveWindowNotExpired
errors.msg: finalize_gone: leave window has not yet expired

errors.name: DelegationsOutstanding
errors.msg: finalize_gone: outstanding delegations must be claimed first

errors.name: EpochObservationsNotClosed
errors.msg: close_epoch: observation PDAs must be closed first

errors.name: ProtectedVault
errors.msg:
Vault is protected (operator min-stake exit vault); cannot be \
         expedited or spent. Use claim_withdrawal after the lock expires.

errors.name: MissingExcessWithdrawal
errors.msg:
leave_network/prune_gateway: post-min stake is positive but \
         excess_withdrawal account was not supplied

errors.name: InvalidExcessWithdrawalPda
errors.msg:
Supplied excess_withdrawal PDA does not match the expected derivation \
         (must be ['withdrawal', operator, withdrawal_counter.next_id + 1])

types.name: AllowlistEntry
docs: Delegate allowlist entry
PDA: ["allowlist", gateway_pubkey, delegate_pubkey]

types.name: AllowlistToggledEvent
docs: Emitted by `set_allowlist_enabled` whenever the per-gateway allowlist
toggle flips.

types.name: DelegateAllowlistedEvent
docs: Emitted by both `allow_delegate` (`allowed: true`) and
`disallow_delegate` (`allowed: false`) — a single event shape covers
both directions to keep the indexer schema flat.

types.name: Delegation
docs: Stake delegation entry
PDA: ["delegation", gateway_pubkey, delegator_pubkey]

fields.name: reward_debt
docs: Snapshot of gateway.cumulative_reward_per_token at last settlement

types.name: DelegationClosedEvent
docs: Emitted by `close_empty_delegation` when the delegation PDA is
closed and rent reclaimed.

types.name: DelegationDecreasedEvent
docs: Emitted by `decrease_delegate_stake`. Parallel to the existing
`DelegationEvent` (which fires on increase + claim flows). Indexers
can pair this with `WithdrawalCreatedEvent` for the post-state of
the locked tokens.

types.name: Epoch
docs: Epoch account tracking state for a specific epoch
PDA: ["epoch", epoch_index.to_le_bytes()]
Zero-copy account with embedded observer/name prescriptions and failure tallies.
Eliminates the need for separate PrescribedObserver, PrescribedName, and
RewardDistribution PDAs.

fields.name: total_composite_weight_lo
docs: total_composite_weight stored as u64 pair to avoid u128 alignment issues in zero_copy.
Use total_composite_weight() / set_total_composite_weight() helpers.

fields.name: observations_closed
docs: Count of `Observation` PDAs that have been closed for this epoch.
`close_epoch` requires `observations_closed == observations_submitted`
so observation rent isn't orphaned when the parent epoch closes
(audit M8). Replaces a former `_padding1` byte — no layout change.

fields.name: failure_counts
docs: Sized to match `GatewayRegistry::MAX_GATEWAYS`. DEVNET-SHRUNK on the
`deploy/devnet` branch (30 vs production 3000) — see GatewayRegistry.

fields.name: prescribed_observers
docs: Observer addresses (the observer_address from Gateway, used to verify signer)

fields.name: prescribed_observer_gateways
docs: Gateway addresses (the operator pubkey, used for reward distribution)

fields.name: prescribed_names
docs: Name hashes prescribed for this epoch

fields.name: has_observed
docs: Bitmap tracking which prescribed observers have submitted (50 bits = 7 bytes)

types.name: EpochClosedEvent
docs: Emitted by `close_epoch` when the epoch PDA is closed. `rent_recovered`
is the lamport delta refunded to the caller (captured pre/post account
close). Marker for retention-window pruning in indexers.

types.name: EpochSettings
docs: Global epoch settings
PDA: ["epoch_settings"]

fields.name: epoch_duration
docs: Duration of each epoch in seconds

fields.name: prescribed_observer_count
docs: Number of observers to prescribe per epoch

fields.name: prescribed_name_count
docs: Number of names to prescribe per epoch

fields.name: min_observer_stake
docs: Minimum stake required to be prescribed as observer

fields.name: slash_rate
docs: Percent of stake to slash for failed observations (scaled by 10000)

fields.name: enabled
docs: Whether epochs are currently enabled

fields.name: current_epoch_index
docs: The current epoch index (incremented each tick)

fields.name: genesis_timestamp
docs: Timestamp of first epoch start

fields.name: tenure_weight_duration
docs: Tenure weight duration in seconds (matches Lua tenureWeightDurationMs / 1000)

fields.name: max_tenure_weight
docs: Maximum tenure weight — Lua: maxTenureWeight = 4

fields.name: gateway_reward_ratio
docs: Gateway reward ratio (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 900_000 = 90%)

fields.name: observer_reward_ratio
docs: Observer reward ratio (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 100_000 = 10%)

fields.name: missed_observation_penalty_rate
docs: Missed observation penalty rate (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 250_000 = 25%)

fields.name: max_reward_rate
docs: Maximum reward rate (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 1_000 = 0.1%)

fields.name: min_reward_rate
docs: Minimum reward rate (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 500 = 0.05%)

fields.name: reward_decay_start_epoch
docs: Epoch index at which reward decay begins

fields.name: reward_decay_last_epoch
docs: Epoch index at which reward decay completes (min rate reached)

fields.name: max_consecutive_failures
docs: Maximum consecutive failures before gateway pruning

fields.name: failed_gateway_slash_rate
docs: Slash rate for failed gateways (scaled by RATE_SCALE, default 1_000_000 = 100%)

fields.name: disable_at
docs: GAR-007: Timestamp at which epochs will be disabled (0 = no pending disable).
When authority calls set_epochs_enabled(false), this is set to clock + 7 days
instead of instantly disabling. create_epoch checks this timestamp.

types.name: EpochWeightsTalliedEvent
docs: Emitted EXACTLY ONCE per epoch by `tally_weights`, on the final batch
(the call that transitions `weights_tallied` from 0 to 1). Mid-batch
calls are silent. Mirrors the `EpochDistributedEvent` summary pattern.

types.name: EpochsToggledEvent
docs: Emitted by `set_epochs_enabled`. Note: enabling is instant (also
cancels any pending disable). Disabling is timelocked — this event
fires on the *intent* to toggle; the actual disable effect is
gated on `disable_at` inside `create_epoch`.

types.name: FundingPlanAppliedEvent
docs: Summary marker for a multi-source funding plan. Per-gateway and per-source
detail is exposed via the per-source `StakePaymentEvent` (Delegation +
OperatorStake), `WithdrawalPaymentEvent` (Withdrawal), and
`ResidueVaultCreatedEvent` (sub-min Delegation residue) emitted alongside.

types.name: FundingSourceKind
docs: Tagged enum describing one source in a funding plan.
Multi-gateway: each source carries its own gateway PDA in remaining_accounts
(no single shared `gateway` slot). Each source consumes a known number of
`remaining_accounts` slots in declaration order — the handler iterates and
slices. See `docs/MULTI_GATEWAY_FUNDING_PLAN.md` for the full layout.

types.name: FundingSourceSpec
docs: One entry in the funding plan vector.

types.name: GarMigrationFinalizedEvent
docs: Emitted by `finalize_migration` when the GAR migration window is
permanently closed. `gateway_count` is the registry count at finalize
time; `slot` is the runtime slot for downstream timestamping.

types.name: Gateway
docs: Gateway registry entry
PDA: ["gateway", operator_pubkey]

fields.name: leave_epoch_duration
docs: Snapshot of `epoch_settings.epoch_duration` (seconds) taken when this
gateway transitioned to Leaving via `leave_network` or `prune_gateway`.
Used by `finalize_gone` to compute the GC eligibility window
(`leave_timestamp + GATEWAY_LEAVE_PERIOD + 7 * leave_epoch_duration`)
without depending on a possibly-mutated live `epoch_settings.epoch_duration`.
Zero for gateways that never left (Joined). Defense-in-depth: `finalize_gone`
also takes `max(this snapshot, current_settings.epoch_duration)` so an
admin shortening of `epoch_duration` cannot retroactively bring forward
a leaver's GC eligibility.

fields.name: observer_address
docs: M3: Separate observer address (matches Lua: observerAddress)
Defaults to operator address if not set. Allows a different wallet to submit observations.

fields.name: cumulative_reward_per_token
docs: Cumulative reward per unit of delegated stake (scaled by REWARD_PRECISION = 1e18)
Increases each epoch during distribute_epoch

types.name: GatewayFinalizedEvent
docs: Emitted by `finalize_gone` when a Leaving gateway's PDA + registry
slot are reclaimed. Pairs with `GatewayPrunedEvent` / `GatewayLeavingEvent`
to signal "gateway gone, drop from caches."

types.name: GatewayPrunedEvent
docs: Emitted by `prune_gateway` (permissionless slash for failed gateways).
`slashed_amount` is the protocol-confiscated portion (0 if the gateway
had less than `min_operator_stake`).

types.name: GatewayRegistry
docs: Global gateway registry for efficient enumeration
PDA: ["gateway_registry"]
NOTE: Uses zero-copy for performance with large gateway counts

fields.name: authority
docs: L-8: Vestigial field — not checked at runtime. Kept to preserve account layout.

fields.name: gateways
docs: DEVNET-SIZED on the `deploy/devnet` branch: 30 slots instead of the
production 3_000. This is a smoke-test devnet — full AO snapshot
import (664 gateways) is intentionally out-of-scope; that flow is
exercised on localnet. **Do not merge this change to `main`** —
mainnet must keep the full 3_000 capacity. Bumped from 10→30 to give
downstream-app developers headroom to `join-network` (10 imported
fixtures + 20 dev seats); see `resize_gateway_registry` for the
admin instruction that grows the existing on-chain account in place.

types.name: GatewaySettings
docs: Global gateway settings
PDA: ["gateway_settings"]

fields.name: migration_active
docs: Whether migration import is active (permanently disabled by finalize_migration)

fields.name: migration_authority
docs: Dedicated migration authority (hot key for batch imports)

fields.name: stake_token_account
docs: C-1: Pinned stake token account address (validated on every instruction that uses it)

fields.name: protocol_token_account
docs: C-2: Pinned protocol token account address (validated on every instruction that uses it)

fields.name: arns_program_id
docs: H-4: ArNS program ID. Pinned at init so `prescribe_epoch` can validate
the NameRegistry account it reads from cross-program. Replaces the
hardcoded string literal previously embedded in `epoch.rs`. Set once
via [`crate::initialize`] and migrated for pre-existing accounts via
[`crate::migrate_settings_set_arns_program_id`].

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Aggregate supply counters — updated atomically at every staking mutation site.
Enables the SDK to return the full AoTokenSupplyData breakdown (parity with Lua).

types.name: GatewaySettings2
docs: Gateway-specific settings (named differently to avoid conflict)

fields.name: allowlist_enabled
docs: When true, only delegates on the allowlist (or existing stakers) can delegate
Matches Lua: allowedDelegatesLookup ~= nil

types.name: GatewaySettingsUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted by `update_gateway_settings` when one or more settings fields
were mutated. `fields_changed` is a u32 bitmask of `GATEWAY_SETTINGS_FIELD_*`
constants — kept compact (vs a Vec<String> of names) so events fit
comfortably under the per-tx log budget.

types.name: GatewaySlot
docs: Entry in the gateway registry, pairing address with cached state for
`create_epoch` / `tally_weights` / `prescribe_epoch` to consult without
having to deserialize the Gateway PDA. Mirrors a subset of the Gateway
record so iteration sites can filter Joined-only without 3000 PDA reads.
`status` is stored as a raw u8 (zero-copy can't carry the typed enum):
0 = Joined, 1 = Leaving, 2 = Gone. See `GatewaySlot::STATUS_*` constants.
`start_timestamp` is the gateway's join time and is used by `create_epoch`
to filter "joined-after-epoch-start" gateways out of `active_gateway_count`.

fields.name: passed_consecutive
docs: Tracks consecutive passed epochs (matches Lua passedConsecutiveEpochs)

types.name: GatewayWeights
docs: Gateway weights for epoch observer selection and reward distribution
All values scaled by RATE_SCALE (1e6) for fixed-point precision
Matches Lua: stakeWeight, tenureWeight, gatewayPerformanceRatio, observerPerformanceRatio, compositeWeight

fields.name: stake_weight
docs: totalStake / minOperatorStake (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: tenure_weight
docs: min(timeRunning / tenureWeightDuration, maxTenureWeight) (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: gateway_performance_ratio
docs: (1 + passedEpochs) / (1 + totalEpochs) (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: observer_performance_ratio
docs: (1 + observedEpochs) / (1 + prescribedEpochs) (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: composite_weight
docs: Product of all weights (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: normalized_composite_weight
docs: compositeWeight / totalCompositeWeight (scaled by RATE_SCALE)

fields.name: weights_epoch
docs: M-5: Epoch index when weights were computed (prevents stale weights)

fields.name: stake_token_account
docs: C-1: Address of the stake token account to pin in settings

fields.name: protocol_token_account
docs: C-2: Address of the protocol token account to pin in settings

fields.name: arns_program_id
docs: H-4: Address of the ario-arns program (used by `prescribe_epoch` to
validate the NameRegistry account it reads from).

fields.name: observer_address
docs: M3: Separate observer address (client passes operator key for default)

types.name: Observation
docs: Observation report from a prescribed observer
PDA: ["observation", epoch_index.to_le_bytes(), observer.to_bytes()]

fields.name: gateway_results
docs: Bitmap of gateway pass/fail results (up to 3000 gateways per observation)
Each bit represents a gateway: 1 = passed, 0 = failed

fields.name: gateway_count
docs: Number of gateways evaluated

fields.name: report_tx_id
docs: Transaction ID of the observation report on Arweave

types.name: ObserverAddressUpdatedEvent
docs: Emitted by `update_observer_address` when the gateway's observer address
changes. Indexers can use this to refresh observer-keyed lookups.

types.name: ObserverLookup
docs: Observer address uniqueness index
PDA: ["observer_lookup", observer_address]
Ensures each observer address is used by at most one gateway.

types.name: OperatorStakeIncreasedEvent
docs: Emitted by `increase_operator_stake`. Symmetric with
`WithdrawalCreatedEvent` (decrease side).

types.name: RedelegationEvent
docs: Emitted by `redelegate_stake`. `amount` is the gross amount moved;
`fee` is the protocol cut (0% on first redelegation, then 10/20/.../60%
per redelegation_count, with a 7-day reset).

types.name: RedelegationRecord
docs: Tracks redelegation history per delegator for fee calculation
PDA: ["redelegation", delegator_pubkey]

fields.name: redelegation_count
docs: Number of redelegations since last fee reset

fields.name: last_redelegation_at
docs: Timestamp of last redelegation

fields.name: fee_reset_at
docs: When the fee counter resets (last_redelegation_at + 7 days)

types.name: RegistryIndex
docs: Gateway registry index
`_reserved` is a layout-preserving placeholder for the legacy
`is_registered: bool` field. The status flag on the Gateway and the
registry slot replace its semantics. The byte stays so existing on-chain
account layouts deserialize correctly; no production code reads or
writes it.

types.name: RewardsCompoundedEvent
docs: Emitted by `compound_delegation_rewards`. `compounded` is the pending
reward newly added to the delegation amount.

types.name: Withdrawal
docs: Pending withdrawal
PDA: ["withdrawal", owner_pubkey, withdrawal_id]

fields.name: is_exit_vault
docs: True if this withdrawal was created by `leave_network` or
`prune_gateway`. Used for analytics + future cleanup logic;
does NOT itself gate any handler. The actual no-instant /
no-fund-from gates live on `is_protected` below.

fields.name: is_protected
docs: True if this is the protected operator min-stake exit vault.
Lua parity (`gar.lua::createGatewayExitVault`): the min portion
of an operator's stake at leave/prune time goes into a vault
that **cannot be expedited** (`instant_withdrawal` rejects)
and **cannot be drained via the funding plan**
(`deduct_withdrawal_for_payment` rejects). Only path out is
`claim_withdrawal` after the 90-day lock expires. The excess
portion of a leave goes into a separate `is_protected: false`
vault that behaves like every other operator-side withdrawal.

types.name: WithdrawalCounter
docs: Tracks next withdrawal ID per user
PDA: ["withdrawal_counter", owner_pubkey]
